design_philosophy: Personal, disciplined, human. A quiet journal for transformation coaching clients — not a loud gym app. Continuous journal entries connected by a thin thread of consistency, not floating card grids.

ink.role: primary dark background, primary text on light

bone.role: light card/surface, primary text on dark

brass.role: SPARINGLY — streaks, PRs, milestones, celebration only

usage_rules: Fraunces ONLY for headings — large, warm, characterful. Never for body or UI labels.
Inter for ALL body text, buttons, UI labels, form fields.
IBM Plex Mono for ALL numeric data — weights, reps, calories, macros, durations, dates. Fixed-width column alignment is the point.

border.note: The ONLY elevation on cards is a 1px hairline border. No drop shadows anywhere.

thread.description: A thin vertical line (1px, Moss at 30% opacity on Ink / Slate at 40% on Bone) that visually connects consecutive logged sessions on any history/timeline view. Represents consistency over time. Always sits to the left of each journal entry at ~24px inset, with a 6px dot marker where each entry begins.

buttons.note: Radius stays at 8px — never fully rounded/pill-shaped.

icons.rule: Simple, consistent line-icons throughout. No mixing icon families.

layout_rules: Mobile-first, generous whitespace, left-aligned reading flow.
NO heavy card-grid dashboard look. Logged items are journal entries in a continuous vertical flow.
Between journal entries: 24px vertical rhythm, connected by the thread.
Section labels: uppercase Inter 13px letter-spaced, Slate color.
forbidden: Drop shadows (elevation is a 1px hairline only)
notes_for_agent: This is a THEME FOUNDATION task — do not build any screens. Only produce the design_guidelines.json, theme module, and reusable primitives (Button, Card, Thread, Heading, BodyText, Numeric, LineIcon).
